## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run build:server` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Tool annotations are correct (`readOnlyHint`, `destructiveHint`, `openWorldHint`)
- [ ] Version bumped in `package.json`, `src/server.ts`, `src/http.ts`, `server.json`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] If you changed MCP tools: `server.json` `tools` array updated to match `createServer()` (see `tests/server_json_tools_sync.test.ts`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
